hint.en:
This app works in Celsius by default; Homey then shows temperatures in your region's unit. Thermostats set to Fahrenheit are supported too — the app converts automatically. Keep the thermostat itself in Celsius for the cleanest values.

To change it on the thermostat: press SYSTEM, then press and hold the two blank buttons to open Installer Setup, go to Function 0330, and select Celsius.
